requiredFindings.summary: The patch reads operand.mask before proving operand is not None.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Any call path where operand itself is None will raise AttributeError instead of copying self.mask.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Handle operand is None before checking operand.mask, and keep separate branches for missing operand vs operand with no mask.

requiredFindings.summary: The test covers an operand with mask None but not operand being None.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: It misses the path broken by the condition rewrite.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add tests for operand is None, self.mask is None, operand.mask is None, and both masks present.
